AI-Assisted Prospecting

Generate prompts for ChatGPT, analyze prospects, and create outreach drafts

Step 1: Configure Audience Profile

Set up your brand details and target audience information

Step 2: Generate Analysis Prompt

Enter prospect IDs and generate a prompt to analyze them

Enter prospect IDs separated by commas

Step 3: Upload Analysis Results

Paste the JSON response from ChatGPT and upload it

Quick Guide

1

Configure your audience profile

Enter your brand details and target audience information

2

Generate prompts

Click "Generate" to create prompts ready for ChatGPT

3

Copy to ChatGPT

Copy the generated prompt and paste it into ChatGPT

4

Upload results

Paste ChatGPT's JSON response and upload it to save
